'''Meenon''' was the [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Senali]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], and the father of [[Yaana]].

The laws of [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]] and Senali made the kings of the planet and the moon exchange their firstborns when they were seven years old, in order to avoid a war. When [[Leed]], King [[Frane]]'s son, was kidnapped by some accomplices of [[Taroon (Rutanian)|Taroon]], Frane blamed the [[Senali (species)|Senali]], and the two kingdoms were near a war. Finally, King Frane accepted Leed's wish to stay in Senali and agreed with Taroon to be his successor and the future King of Rutan.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
